name: IMMUCELL CORP /DE/
summary: ImmuCell Corporation, founded in 1982, is an animal health biologics company focused on developing, manufacturing, and commercializing products to improve the survivability and health of neonatal dairy and beef calves. Its primary product line, First Defense, uses hyperimmunized bovine colostrum to deliver pathogen-specific antibodies against E. coli, bovine coronavirus, and bovine rotavirus, preventing neonatal calf scours. Products are sold under brand names Dual-Force and Tri-Shield, and the company also offers a California Mastitis Test diagnostic.

products.name: First Defense (Dual-Force)
products.description: USDA-licensed orally delivered scours preventive in bolus or gel format, providing antibodies against E. coli and coronavirus in newborn calves.

products.name: First Defense (Tri-Shield)
products.description: USDA-licensed orally delivered scours preventive protecting against E. coli, coronavirus, and rotavirus in newborn calves.

products.name: First Defense Technology
products.description: Bulk powder functional feed ingredients derived from hyperimmune colostrum, designed for batch mixing in liquid feeding programs for larger calf-rearing operations.

products.name: California Mastitis Test (CMT)
products.description: Quick on-farm diagnostic test to determine which quarter of the udder is mastitic.

products.name: Re-Tain
products.description: Innovative treatment for subclinical mastitis; further investment paused in December 2025 to focus on scours market.

partnerships.description: Company uses third parties to manufacture certain product formats.

partnerships.partner_name: International, national, and regional animal health distributors
partnerships.description: Products are marketed through ImmuCell's commercial sales organization in collaboration with a distributor network.
